Package Index | Class Index
Summary: Constants | Fields | Methods | Inherited Methods | [Expand All]
public class

Api

extends Object
java.lang.Object
   ↳ com.autolink.manager.Api

Class Overview

This class is the interface for the AutoLink API. It provides access the api that application sample code: 

 Api api = Api.createApi(this);
 api.addServiceLifecycleListener(Api.CAR,(managerBase, serviceName, ready) -> {
      Log.d(TAG, "onLifecycleChanged: " + ready + " " + serviceName + " " + managerBase);
      CarManager manager = (CarManager) api.getManager(Api.CAR);
 });
